mkdir -p github-pages cat > github-pages/index.html << 'HTMLEOF' Playwright Reports - PW_2025_Batch_Framework
PW_2025_Batch_Framework
run complete
ENV_TOKEN BROWSER_TOKEN DATE_TOKEN
Built-in HTML report with traces, screenshots & timeline
playwright-report → open
Custom reporter with embedded assets & attachments
html-report → open
Full Allure dashboard with history, trends & categories
allure-report → open
asingh403.github.io/PW2025BatchFramework
HTMLEOF sed -i "s|ENV_TOKEN|${ENV}|g" github-pages/index.html sed -i "s|ENV_COLOR|#${ENV_COLOR}|g" github-pages/index.html sed -i "s|BROWSER_TOKEN|${BROWSER}|g" github-pages/index.html sed -i "s|DATE_TOKEN|${CURRENT_DATE}|g" github-pages/index.html
